reviews.review_description: My favourite site has StartVR set up, and it's fantastic. Easy to use, and the image quality is great.

developer_response.body: Thank you!

reviews.review_description: Constantly crashes and says device has reached maximum limited memory available. From what I have read it seems like they have a memory leak problem with their app. No other apps or games give me memory leak problems so I am assuming it's the app itself which is a shame.
Freezes all the time on quest 3 and the headset has to be restarted by holding power button for 15 seconds. Absolutely unusable

developer_response.body:
Hi! Sorry to hear that — we know how frustrating that is.
A major update is coming this week with stability fixes that should resolve this on Quest 3. Thank you for your patience!

reviews.review_title: It was fine now the videos don’t work

developer_response.body: Hi! Sorry to hear that. A major update is coming this week with stability fixes that should resolve a lot of issues. Thank you for your patience!

reviews.review_description:
Excellent for offline use, just make sure you know the file names correctly, as shown below. This information could have been included in the description, but I had to find it on the website.

StereoMode:
_180 / _360

Screen Type:
"_LR" or "_3DH" or "_SBS" "_TB" or "_3DV" or "_OverUnder"

Example:
Title_SBS_180.mkv

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback!

reviews.review_description:
Great app but seems to be comp
letely broken for now

developer_response.body: Hi! Sorry to hear that. A major update is coming this week with stability fixes that should resolve a lot of issues. Thank you for your patience!

reviews.review_description: When I open the app the picture location is way off. Very difficult to re center it, also during video play I cand move that picture either. So I have to adjust my body position to watch anything. My free cardboard app adjusted the video automatically,  so I can decide to sit or lay down or whatever and the video just moved in front of me. Also, sometimes the curser selects anything it touches, other times I have to do it manually and hope it doesn't grab it. The video quality runs very well and audio seems to keep up. I'll update this review if I see improvement or figure out what's wrong.

developer_response.body:
Hi! Thank you for the detailed feedback — we really appreciate it.

Could you please describe the issue a bit more and send it to us at media@startvr.io ? If possible, include your headset model and a short video of the problem. We’ll look into it and work on improving the experience.

reviews.review_description: Zero issues.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback!

reviews.review_description: Installed app and allowed permission for video and photos and to storage.  Browsed to my movie folder on my Quest 2 and not a single file is listed.  There is a login button but login into where ? There is no registration.  If you browse to a website you are told the site has no API support,  try again. Where is there a list of supported websites.  The developer's website says the list is growing but provides no list. I don't see how this app passed Meta's criteria for being listed on the store.

developer_response.body:
Hi! Sorry to hear it wasn’t a great experience for you. We’re primarily a player for local videos, and we’ll be adding a small built-in video library soon. At the moment, we don’t have a public list of supported websites yet — we’re still working on that.
If you weren’t able to play certain files, please let us know which format caused the issue by emailing media@startvr.io We’d really appreciate the details and will look into it. Hope you’ll give it another try!

reviews.review_description: If environment is dark enough so as to prevent hands from being tracked, player won't even start. This happens only since a couple of weeks ago.

developer_response.body: Hi! Sorry to hear that — we know how frustrating that is. A major update is coming this week with stability fixes that should resolve this on Quest 3. Thank you for your patience!

reviews.review_description: When i try to login, "wrong password or username"

developer_response.body: Hi thank you for reaching out, the login issue you had been experiencing should now be resolved.

developer_response.body: Hi! Sorry to hear it wasn’t a great experience for you. We’ll be adding a small built-in video library soon — hope you’ll give it another try!

reviews.review_title: One of my favorite vr players
reviews.review_description: I like the look of the video quality, the gamma setting is very helpful.  It’s easy to use, but I don’t like how the app reverts to monoscopic most all the time.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback, we will continue to update and work to address your issue.
